title: R4-S2
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''R4-S2''' was a smaller-than-normal red and gold [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]. It belonged to [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leki]] [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] who set out to explore the moon of [[Uffel]], as part of their vessel's droid pool. Its responsibility was as a maintenance droid which made minor repairs and kept the electronics system functioning properly. It had an extendible "neck" by which it could raise its head-cone to see into higher levels of the ship.

When the scouts' ship crashed in [[90 BBY/Legends|90 BBY]], R4-S2 was one of three droids which managed to survive and repair itself, along with fellow astromech [[R4-J9]] and the [[Administrative droid/Legends|administrative droid]] [[QS-2D]]. The droid went on to work for QS-2D, surveying [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] deposits of the moon and helping to set up [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations.

R4-S2 was active in [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]].

==Sources==
